top_signals.title: PBOC’s New Overnight Rate Said Below Forecasts in Hint at Easing
top_signals.summary: China’s central bank set the interest rate on its new overnight liquidity tool at a level that was below expectations, according to people familiar with the matter, in what some economists see as a de facto rate cut that could push down market borrowing costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: BIS says stablecoins fall short as money, warns of emerging-market risks in annual report
top_signals.summary: The Bank for International Settlements argued in its annual report that stablecoins still fall short of money on singleness, elasticity and integrity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Google caps Meta’s Gemini use as AI demand strains capacity

top_signals.title: Dubai crypto market hits 50 licensed firms after new VARA approval
top_signals.summary: Dubai’s VARA has licensed its 50th crypto firm, though only 39 VASPs were fully operational at the end of 2025 as the emirate’s regulated market continues to expand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
